title: Global Supply Chain Pressure Index
summary: This crawl captured only navigation and site-wide elements from the New York Fed GSCPI page. The actual index data, methodology description, and visualization content were not retrieved. No substantive information about supply chain pressures, index values, or trends is available from this source.
key_points: Crawl retrieved only site navigation text (Terms of Use, Privacy Statement links) and cookie consent language
Actual GSCPI data, methodology, and interactive content were not captured
Source domain (newyorkfed.org) is high-trust but content extraction failed
No index values, historical data points, or analysis present in the crawled text
why_it_matters: Cannot be used for market structure or macro catalyst research. The GSCPI is a published indicator combining global supply chain metrics; without the actual data, this record has no analytical value.

issues_found: Source body contains only site navigation elements (Terms of Use, Privacy Statement, cookie consent) — no actual GSCPI content

Record accurately identifies this as a crawl failure with zero analytical value

notes: CRITICAL CONTENT GAP: The crawl failed to retrieve the actual GSCPI page content. The source body contains only site-wide navigation text (cookie consent, Terms of Use, Privacy links).
